name: Aarav Hayes
summary: Motivated Junior DevOps Engineer with 1.5 years of experience in cloud infrastructure and automation. Recently completed DevOps bootcamp and eager to apply CI/CD best practices in production environments. Strong foundation in Linux administration, containerization, and infrastructure as code. Quick learner with a passion for automation and continuous improvement.

workExperience.title: Junior DevOps Engineer

Document deployment procedures and runbooks

name: Abigail Bauer
summary: Career changer transitioning from sales to DevOps engineering. Recently completed intensive DevOps bootcamp (DevOps Experts, 2024). Strong communication skills, customer-focused mindset, and passion for technology. Quick learner with demonstrated ability to master new technical concepts. Seeking junior DevOps role to apply newly acquired skills.

name: Addison Tran
summary: Site Reliability Engineer with 4 years of experience building and maintaining highly available systems. Specialized in observability, incident response, and automation. Strong background in Kubernetes orchestration, monitoring stack design, and performance optimization. Passionate about improving system reliability through SRE best practices and SLO-driven development.

workExperience.title: Site Reliability Engineer
workExperience.description: Manage production Kubernetes clusters serving 50M+ requests daily
highlights: Reduced incident MTTR by 60% through improved monitoring and automated remediation
Designed and implemented observability stack using Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki
Created SLO framework and error budget policies for 15+ services
Led post-mortem process and drove reliability improvements
Built CI/CD pipelines integrating automated testing and progressive deployment
